target: 10. Tokiko in the Darkness
If you move, I'll kill you.
The copy was just a fake, but...
It's a good thing I didn't erase the real gun.
(The gun that Ushio destroyed was a copy!)
(A copied machine is just a useless replica unless the real one is erased...)
(I should have realized it was a decoy the moment she showed off the self-defense gun she should have been hiding...)
Damn…!
Coming so close, so defenselessly like that... That's not like Ushio-san at all...
Tokiko…!
Shinpei-san... Weren't you a bit careless too?
True... I had chances to notice. But...!
Are you saying you believed in me? Even though I've become a monster like this...
To... kiko...! Y-You...!
The day after tomorrow—on the day of the festival, if we give her the final meal, Haine's power will return, and Mom should be able to live longer.
It wasn't just Mom. As a condition for cooperating with Haine, I made her promise the safety of you and Mio.
And yet... because Ushio-san and Shinpei-san started doing unnecessary things, everything went wrong.
You're wrong! Haine never intended to keep her promise! She planned to betray you from the start!
If Ushio... if Ushio were here... I could have shown you Haine's true nature!
Even if Haine planned to betray me... What does that matter?
Because she's a bad person... Because she's a liar, you think she'll be destroyed?
Whether it's right or wrong, in the end, the strong one wins.
Tokiko... Do you even know what you're saying—
I know...! But just think about it...
Being ordered to... and then preparing myself to become a Shadow, only to be confronted with facts that were different from what I desperately believed...
She wasn't supposed to lay a hand on Mio, but she was copied without me knowing...
But, but even so, I can't defy her! If I do, I don't know what will happen to Mio...!
Haine is angry because of you guys!
Calm down, Tokiko! You can't be afraid of Haine forever! The future can be changed!
If that's the case... We can change the "future where Haine betrays me" too, isn't that right?
Th-That's a bit different...!
What's different? If I defeat Ushio-san and Shinpei-san, Haine's mood should improve.
Then, she might at least spare Mio... and you, older brother.
Are you an idiot! If Haine wins, everyone will die!
Ushio-san is already gone. The basis for believing what you say has also disappeared.
…Tokiko!
If anything, Mio and you, older brother, could just be turned into Shadows like me.
Turn into a Shadow... I-I don't want that!
Relax. Even as a Shadow, you're no different from the real thing.
Ah, if Mio is going to become a Shadow, we'll have to get rid of the current Shadow Mio. That one is messed up.
If I ask Haine, she can even make us forget that we were killing each other like this.
Like my mom, it would be nice to be made to forget even the fact that I'm a Shadow.
Then it'll be no different from when we were human. Just like always, happily—
That's a lie! You don't really think that!
You stay quiet, older brother!
You're the one who needs to shut up! What you're saying makes no sense!!
Holding something that doesn't suit you like a gun... You really have a terrible look on your face.
But you know... Isn't that face, full of regret, your true feelings?
It's too late…
There's nothing we can do anymore!
—Gah!?
Shinpei!!!
(A Shadow extending from Toki-chan... It's squeezing me!?)
(I-I can't move...!)
